calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alex Bohnhoff in Propria Persona. Nuran Mora in Propria Persona.

The Parties explained the process that took place with regard to their marriage. The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Continued To Oct-04-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alex Bohnhoff and Nuran Itzel Arias Mora both in pro per.

Mr. Bohnhoff stated that they tried to file it with the Court Clerk, that the they passed it on to Julia Leiva, that after that they were informed that because of their faith that she wasn't sure they used the right license. The Court addressed issue with regard to Ms. Mora's age (17) at the time of the marriage, that there was no consent by the parents, and that there was no license by the person performing the marriage. Mr. Bohnhoff stated that his wife's parents did consent and that they had to consent just to obtain the license. The Court inquired why the license was obtained in San Francisco. Mr. Bohnhoff responded. The Court stated that it would need a copy of the Court order and a copy of the agreement between the State of California and the Bahia community in order to go forward. The Court continued the matter to October 4, 2011, instructed Mr. Bohnhoff to file these documents with a cover sheet, and stated that the documents should be on file by September 27, 2011.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
